title: Crypto Savings Expert teams up with Cryptool on user education
content_html:
Education was always going to be part of the Cryptool roadmap. The faster path was to partner with an established voice rather than build the library in-house, and that voice is Crypto Savings Expert: one of the longer-running independent crypto education brands.

The collaboration puts their guides, market analysis and beginner material in front of the Cryptool community. Newcomers get a clear starting point. Experienced investors get sharper market context to feed into their decisions. Both groups benefit immediately, without waiting for an in-house team to spin up.
author: Cryptool
